name: Axend
description: Developer of a digital financial lending platform designed to raise crowdsourced loans for businesses. The company's platform lets anyone invest in businesses using alternative investment products such as person-to-person and SME loans, besides carrying out investments in real estate, factoring, cryptocurrencies, and concerts among others, enabling organizations to raise debt financing via crowdfunding to fund their businesses in a secure manner.

name: Ayenda
description: Operator of a hotel accommodation platform intended to offer standardized rooms at low prices. The company's platform offers a network of hotel rooms at prices falling under a reasonable budget segment which can be booked through a platform along with services like free WiFi and clean sheets, enabling customers to access quality amenities and experiences while traveling.

name: Briko
description: Operator of a digital educational platform intended to offer robotics and programming language lessons for children. The company's platform provides online training courses to coach students on robotics programming and projects using practical engineering workshops and a robotics designing toolkit, enabling children and young people to learn programming in an easy and fun way.

name: Expansive
description: Developer of an online investment platform created to facilitate real estate crowdfunding. The company's platform displays real estate projects with descriptions, risk factors as well as performance to investors for funding, enabling small and medium-sized developers with the lack of opportunities to finance their projects.

name: Gurú de Viaje
description: Operator of a travel management platform intended to provide deals on flights and tours. The company's platform offers guided tours to different destinations across the world by making travel arrangements, booking tickets, and making hotel reservations, enabling customers to get holiday packages in an affordable and convenient manner.

name: Memorick
description: Operator of a photographer booking platform intended to connect travelers and local photographers. The company's platform offers vacation photo-shoot services, connecting tourists with local photographers at affordable prices, enabling tourists to ensure that they get their good pictures clicked and turn those memories into a souvenir.

name: Prescrypto
description: Developer of an electronic medical prescription platform designed to create and send medical prescriptions online. The company's platform offers built-in catalogs of medicines with photos, streamlines the process of prescription, manages the medical recipe and uses blockchain technologies to prevent drug trafficking, enabling medical practitioners to analyze medications and track, generate and audit medical prescriptions in a consolidated and secure data repository.

name: Spider Fleet
description: Provider of a fleet management system created to evaluate driving performance and control fuel consumption. The company's system offers total monitoring of operator management behaviors, real-time geolocation of vehicles, intelligent routes and itineraries tracking, and fuel control and maintenance, enabling customers to radically improve the management of commercial and private vehicle fleets.

name: Sportwey
description: Developer of a sports search platform intended to create, manage and find amateur sports tournaments. The company's platform offers tools for managing various aspects of a sports tournament including communication, payment, notifications, calendar integration, application and registration management, enabling athletes to connect with local tournaments easily every day.

name: Trato
description: Developer of a contract lifecycle management software intended to simplify and automate legal processes. The company's platform leverages blockchain to automate the flow of contracts including the creation, collaboration, use of electronic signatures, and monitoring, enabling financial institutions and law firms to manage, execute, and report all types of contracts feasibly.

name: Y&S
description: Developer of a beauty booking mobile application designed to discover and book shifts in beauty centers. The company's beauty booking mobile application helps users to find beauty salons, spa centers and parlours and it offers a database of available services by those salons with prices, enabling users to browse, find and book parlour slots with required services as per their preferable time.
